deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Close May 1 2026. CMA comps: 31 pulled, avg $207K. Current mortgage $164K, equity ~$101K.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, build first analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters expressed desire to end listing after March. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer) contingent on mobile home project. Title defect confirmed - incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Deal terminated - Chris walking away, signs picked up

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away from deal. Signs retrieved from property last week.
Title defect confirmed. Deed has incomplete legal description. Attorney hired for correction deed.
Chris updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaac Linares development offer (~$150K). Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property to make updates and repairs, relist when timing is right. VA loan balance $489,501 as of 3/13/26. Underwater approximately $93-143K. Relationship intact - ended on good terms.
deals.next: Confirm signed termination release received from both parties

logs.m: Listing terminated. Sellers moving back in. Plan to relist after updates and repairs. Termination release sent for signatures.
Honest call completed. Presented three paths forward. Chandler was laid off. Sellers leaning toward short sale.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis presented. Full payoff confirmed $489,501. Three options laid out.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build. Laura Heights PUD. Listed May 14. Second-look buyers returned for second showing. June deadline for sellers relocating to NC. Multiple interested buyers in early phase. Potential hairline foundation crack flagged.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Multiple interested buyers, all in early search phase. Second-look buyers returned for viewing - their favorite property. Decisions expected in 1-2 weeks.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. Kept conversation open. 4th showing scheduled for May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. First showing at 9:15am. Canvassed neighborhood. Sign and lockbox dropped.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Going through divorce. Payoff $255,578 as of Feb 2026 (~$257K today). CMA pulled. Recommended list price $295K. Net sheets built. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed at $255,578. CMA pulled with 3 comps. Built listing presentation with interactive net sheet.
Prior clients helped with VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Military buyer (Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Cleared and funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver joy gift basket plus rug and trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Send thank you basket to Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded. Confirmed complete May 9.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family member). Understanding and willing to work with us.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. Waiting on earnest money deposit and signed TXR 1903 amendment. Buyer's agent is Javier. Escrow opened with Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain (tmail.com may be typo for gmail.com).

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza family, buyer's agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. EMD not yet received. Another agent called with backup buyers interest.
Price reduced to $117,500. MLS updated. Commission box correction still needed on amendment.
Property clearing complete. Steve sent photos. Drone footage next content priority.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Contractor: HouzzPro/Matt Toney. Work started May 9. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Three cameras installed.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) confirm meter install status. Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) confirm water setup. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Priority Bank.

logs.m: Property visited - cameras installed, electric reconnected, drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow/Thursday. Water meter 1-2 days. Sent Kelly photo updates.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Kelly got mileage approved for ACH payment.
Floor demo complete. Drywall cut and new drywall on site. Utility providers identified.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement income plus daughters disability checks. Paying $1,700/month rent. VA loan eligible, zero down. Between jobs. Actively fixing credit. Nextdoor connection from High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Call today May 14. VA lender connection needed. Timeline, budget, area TBD on call.

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Has been overdue since Apr 30. VA buyer, motivated. Do not let slip again.
Spoke with Pamela. Sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation. Following up Apr 30.
Confirmed military retirement and daughters disability income. Text sent about VA benefits, zero down, lender connection.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus deal, still searching. Rental property being sold by landlord. Need to move faster. 916 Marriott passed (foundation issues). Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives. Lenders: Zach Schaphorst (MTG Broker) and Erik Williams (Success Lending).
leads.next: Follow up after Mike/Isaac phone call on 301 W Saxet deal. If deal falls through, revisit new construction search with builders.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching. Isaac updated on decision. Josh (LT) interested in Corpus property.
New direction: Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Mike and Alice connected with Isaac. Zach S sent property info for 203k evaluation.
Rental being sold. Rental property being renovated, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction. Rate buydowns discussed.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran's mother. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I payment. Not locked to Grace Gardens. Multiple builder options being pulled. Rate buydowns are key angle. Two-year rental plan then owner-occupy from California.
leads.next: Follow up on buyer rep signature status. New home sales reps pulling inventory. MI Homes option from Frank in play. Confirm builder registration process before any visits.

logs.m: MI Homes (Frank, sales rep) found home option keeping payments under $1,200/mo. Working multiple builder options.
Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Not yet signed. Need to prioritize. Builder outreach template drafted.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs also in folder. Not locked to Grace Gardens.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration (with permission). Healing through gardens angle. Little Red House network.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story for content. Keep nurturing, no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Connected through garden share group conversation. Potential content collaboration pending permission.

leads.title: Bryce (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (dumpster contractor). Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase San Antonio area home. Community-first relationship.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when on site at 181 CR. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Recently relocated from Ohio, currently renting.

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path - Showings & Offers
priorities.sub: Follow up with second-look buyers, monitor backup offers
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers returned for second showing - their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered. Confirm May 30 showing time. Other agent interested with backup buyers.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with agent
Follow up with second-look buyers agent after pre-inspection report

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 - Utilities & Listing Agreement
priorities.sub: Complete electric and water setup, submit listing agreement to Priority Bank
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected. Water meter pending 1-2 days. Flooring happening this week. Drywall and paint nearly done. Need to call utility companies and submit listing agreement to bank.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) confirm meter install status
Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) confirm water meter setup
Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham at Priority Bank

priorities.title: Pamela Moore VA Buyer - Call Today
priorities.sub: Hot lead overdue for follow-up since Apr 30
priorities.notes: Military retirement income, daughters disability, paying $1,700/month rent. VA loan eligible, zero down. Between jobs. Do not let this lead slip - hot buyer with strong motivation.

followUps.text: Connect with VA-approved lender (Zach or Erik)

priorities.title: 485 W FM 462 Brown Listing - Prepare for Market
priorities.sub: Colton & Abigail divorce sale, get agreement signed and photos scheduled
priorities.notes: Payoff confirmed $255K. CMA pulled, recommended list $295K. Thin market with only 3 comps. Need updated payoff letter, listing agreement signed, professional photos scheduled.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Confirm acreage and renovation status with sellers

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer - Builder Registration & Inventory
priorities.sub: New construction buyer, not locked to any builder, need to register as agent on first visit
priorities.notes: Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. Multiple builders being evaluated. MI Homes option in play. Must register as buyer agent on first builder visit. Builder rate buydowns are key angle.

followUps.text: Confirm buyer rep signature from Milagros
Pull new construction inventory across Grace Gardens, Cadence Springs, Randall Crossing
Register as buyer agent with builders before any model home visits
Follow up with MI Homes on Frank rate buydown option
